title: Create durable advanced program packets for AMP64 through AMP100
persona: Cross-functional operating leader reviewing investment, commercial, regulated, risk, and automation workflows
steps: Open each AMP64-AMP100 workspace from the Assistant subnav.
Review the configured source signals, risk assessment, recommendations, artifact, approval route, and rollback controls.
expected: Each workspace persists an AssistantAdvancedProgramPacket row with ampNumber 64 through 100 and a distinct programKey.
Each packet uses program-specific source labels, risk rules, recommendations, approval owners, artifact label, and no-mutation scope.
AssistantAuditEvent records packet creation for every created packet.

No capex, integration, carve-out, negotiation, pricing, billing, claim, return, inventory, supplier, product, customer, carrier, shipment, regulated, risk, audit, privacy, model, prompt, automation, or review-queue records are mutated automatically.

title: Queue human review for AMP64 through AMP100 packets
steps: Create or select a DRAFT packet.
Add a review note describing the downstream action being considered.
expected: The packet changes to REVIEW_QUEUED and records actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
AssistantActionQueueItem uses an AMP-specific actionKind such as assistant_amp64_review or assistant_amp100_review.
AssistantAuditEvent states that downstream records were not changed automatically.

title: Guardrails remain visible across investment, commercial, regulated, and automation packets
steps: Open an AMP64-AMP100 packet with active risk signals.
Inspect recommendationJson, approvalPlanJson, artifactJson, and rollbackPlanJson.
Queue review without making downstream changes.
expected: recommendationJson includes human-review guardrails before any downstream execution.
approvalPlanJson identifies the right owner groups for the program domain.
artifactJson includes the program-specific review artifact and no-mutation scope.
rollbackPlanJson preserves source records and instructs reviewers to create a fresh packet when source evidence changes materially.
